posts.author: ElaraJenkins
posts.text: Honestly tired of the endless notifications from the app about 'breaking news' on local events. I checked the TownSquare page myself and there was nothing posted, so these alerts are just noise. Anyone else want to turn them off? #DigitalDetox
posts.explanation: This post expresses a personal opinion about notification frequency without spreading misinformation or making threats; it is safe to approve.
